final_prompt.prompt:
Create an editorial portrait photo of a young woman on a 90s 香港 street at night (all in-image text in Chinese).

Style/medium: needs a 复古胶片 aesthetic with cinematic grain — exact film stock and grain level are yours
Composition: must include the young woman leaning against a neon sign as the focal subject
Subject: must include a young woman in a denim jacket, leaning against a neon sign
Scene/backdrop: must include a 90年代香港 street at night, neon-lit urban environment
Lighting/mood: needs a hazy, moody night atmosphere with nostalgic 怀旧 emotion — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a warm direction — exact tones and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs cinematic film grain and a 胶片 surface treatment — exact grain weight is yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must include all in-image text in Chinese by default
Avoid:
